title: aurinia petraea subsp. microcarpa
intro: Aurinia petraea subsp. microcarpa, also known as the alpine stock or small-flowered aurinia, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant's roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Aurinia petraea subsp. microcarpa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the body's natural detoxification processes.
